word: G329 - ἀναζωπυρέω - anazōpyréō - an-ad-zo-poor-eh'-o - Stir up

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀναζωπυρέω

- Transliteration: Anazopureo

- Phonetic: an-ad-zo-poor-eh'-o

- Definition:

1. to kindle up, inflame one's mind, strength, zeal

- Origin: from G303 and a compound of the base of G2226 and G4442

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G303 and a compound of the base of G2226 and G4442; to re-enkindle: - stir up.
